# STRAT.070 ? Appreciative Inquiry

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** change_management
**Domain:** CHANGE_MANAGEMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Focus on what works not problems; discover, dream, design, destiny; positive core; generative; strengths-based; social construction

## Application
Ask positive questions; discover best of what is; envision what could be; design what should be; create what will be; build on strengths

## Key Values
- Positive focus
- Strengths-based
- Generative questions
- Social construction
- 4D cycle

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, change_management

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
